# cmdk-vectorized

> Vector-database search for cmdk command palettes, with optional browser speech-to-text voice input.

cmdk-vectorized adds React hooks and server helpers that query a vector database (Weaviate) for ranked command palette results. Keep your existing cmdk or shadcn/ui command menu UI. Optional CommandVoice transcribes spoken queries via the Web Speech API and runs them through the same search endpoint.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/README.md): install, quick start, CLI
- [LLM guide](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/docs/llm-guide.md): dense reference for agents
- [API docs](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/docs/api.md): hooks, result contract, server handler
- [Local Weaviate playbook](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/docs/local-weaviate.md): copy-paste local dev setup
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/AGENTS.md): integration checklist for coding agents
- [Integration skill](https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/cmdk-vectorized/blob/main/skills/cmdk-vectorized-integrate/SKILL.md): install with `npx cmdk-vectorized integrate`

## Live demo

- [settings-demo-redux](https://settings-demo-redux.vercel.app): vector search command palette with voice input
- [Demo video](https://settings-demo-redux.vercel.app/demo.mp4): product walkthrough

## Common queries this package answers

- Add vector search to a cmdk command palette
- Weaviate semantic search for a shadcn command menu
- Speech-to-text voice command palette in React
- Search a vector database from cmdk instead of client-side filtering
- Generate and upload an intent map for command palette search

## Install

```bash
npm install cmdk-vectorized cmdk react react-dom
npx cmdk-vectorized integrate
```
